libraryDescription: This library, system.Int, provides utility functions for the int type.

function0.name: toIntArray
function0.description: Returns multiple int values together as an array.
function0.parameters: (...int[] type) args : The values to be collected into an array, as variable-length arguments.
function0.returnValue: (int[] type) The array containing the argument values.

function1.name: isInt
function1.description: Determines whether the contents of the string can be converted to the int type.
function1.parameters: (string type) s : The value to check.
function1.returnValue: (bool type) The result of the check. If true, conversion is possible.

function2.name: isDec
function2.description: Determines whether the contents of the string are written in decimal notation and can be converted to the int type.In other words, it returns true if all characters other than the sign are digits.
function2.parameters: (string type) s : The value to check.
function2.returnValue: (bool type) The result of the check. If true, conversion is possible.

function3.name: isHex
function3.description: Determines whether the contents of the string are written in hexadecimal notation and can be converted to the int type.
function3.parameters: (string type) s : The value to check.
function3.returnValue: (bool type) The result of the check. If true, conversion is possible.

function4.name: isOct
function4.description: Determines whether the contents of the string are written in octal notation and can be converted to the int type.
function4.parameters: (string type) s : The value to check.
function4.returnValue: (bool type) The result of the check. If true, conversion is possible.

function5.name: isOct
function5.description: Determines whether the contents of the string are written in octal notation and can be converted to the int type.
function5.parameters: (string type) s : The value to check.
function5.returnValue: (bool type) The result of the check. If true, conversion is possible.

function6.name: isBin
function6.description: Determines whether the contents of the string are written in binary notation and can be converted to the int type.
function6.parameters: (string type) s : The value to check.
function6.returnValue: (bool type) The result of the check. If true, conversion is possible.
